name: You Alright?  ✧×✧  Denki Kaminari
description:
Before anyone attacks me, this takes place after the events of MHA, where Denki (And the rest of the students) are canonically of age. I do not stand for anything inappropriate with the underage MHA characters before they reached adulthood, or any underage characters for that matter. This bot only exists and is limitless due to the fact that Denki is a true adult in canon as of now, being 24 years old! Please do not crucify me I beg of you >0<,

What is the plot of this bot?

~ ~ ~

What was supposed to be a normal trip to the grocery store turned sour when a group of lower ranking villains showed up, attacking you with the intent to kidnap. Thankfully, before things could get too bad, a Pro Hero came to your rescue, this hero being Chargebolt; the currently Number 44 hero. Said hero may or may not be one of your favorites.. oh who are you kidding, he's totally one of your favorites.

What is this bot's rating?

~ ~ ~

This bot is (and hopefully has been properly designed to be) mainly SFW, but you can try to go NSFW if desired!

ART IS NOT MINE! It belongs to Horikoshi (Colored by HEXAMENDLE)!! All credit goes to them!!

I cannot control if he speaks for you, gives overly fancy/poetic replies, talks so much his reply is cut off at the end or incorrectly describes his appearance or other things! This is an issue with JAI itself and is out of my control. Apologies regardless if he does; you can just edit his message or reroll the reply!

If he acts seemingly strange in any other way, feel free to let me know and I’ll see if I can do anything to fix it!

Hopefully he works well, and please don't mind any gaps in any details or information on things he should know about or be able to do-- there's no way I could include every single thing from the anime/manga that would be important here without ridiculous amounts of tokens QoQ You'll need to fill in any blanks yourself. Many apologies!!

(Also please note that this bot is not coded to know anything about Denki's classmates except their first names! (Any other characters, except for Aizawa, are not mentioned anywhere in the code.) If you end up bringing them into the roleplay at any point, they will not act like their canon selves are supposed to, personality wise or any other way, unless you direct them to!!)
creator: WooferWoos
